query: SELECT id, name, url, category, program FROM affiliate_links WHERE url LIKE '%anrdoezrs%' OR url LIKE '%dpbolvw%' OR url LIKE '%tkqlhce%' OR url LIKE '%jdoqocy%' OR url LIKE '%kqzyfj%' LIMIT 20;
